forbidden_capabilities: fabricated model bundle, quality, latency, throughput, memory, cost, concurrency, fallback or soak evidence
model source download, conversion, quantization or GGUF creation
automatic legal approval or license decision inference
model activation, routing change or production composition write
ADMITTED decision from pending or unverified primary/fallback evidence
production readiness or operational attestation claim
acceptance: v1 model admission remains unchanged and available
v2 authority binds exact Qwen and Mistral revisions and registered bundle quantizations
v2 requires 58 evaluation cases including 23 critical cases and zero critical unsupported facts
v2 requires primary CPU, primary GPU/shared and fallback CPU runtime profiles with exact concurrency matrices
v2 requires separate RAM/VRAM, cold start, warmup, operating cost, fallback exercise and one-hour soak evidence
all evidence files verify from original and independently restored roots with strict path, type, size, digest and inode checks
joint admission requires independently VERIFIED primary and fallback reports and current benchmark timestamps
committed baselines remain PENDING_BENCHMARK and produce PENDING_ADMISSION with non-zero CLI exit
no model bytes, benchmark logs or measured values are committed
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest/coverage, security/runtime and exact-head CI pass
